Based on the zoomed-in view of atom 10 (C), I can identify the following covalently bonded neighbor atoms:

**Neighbor atoms of atom index 10 (C):**
- Atom 9 (N) - Nitrogen
- Atom 11 (C) - Carbon  
- Atom 15 (C) - Carbon

**geomconf_index:** 1944

The carbon atom at index 10 is bonded to one nitrogen atom (index 9) and two carbon atoms (indices 11 and 15), giving it a total of 3 covalent bonds visible in this structure.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 10 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
